stemHtml: You are a commander of a flight, where an anti-icing and de-icing procedure has been applied. There is freezing precipitation. Because you have to use a different runway for take-off, there is a delay. You can see a film of contamination on the wing, but the holdover time is not yet exceeded. Your next action is:

options.a: Switch on all the aircraft anti-icing and de-icing systems until clear of icing conditions when airborne.
options.b: You taxi back for de-icing and anti-icing.
options.c: You contact ATC and ask for further advice.
options.d: You continue to the take-off position and take-off, provided the holdover time is not exceeded.
